name: @claude-flow/memory
description: Memory module - AgentDB unification, HNSW indexing, vector search, hybrid SQLite+AgentDB backend (ADR-009)

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && node -e "const m = await import('./dist/index.js'); const required = ['ControllerRegistry','HnswLite','PersistentSonaCoordinator','RvfBackend','RvfLearningStore','RvfMigrator']; const missing = required.filter(k => !m[k]); if (missing.length) { console.error('Missing exports:', missing); process.exit(1); } console.log('All required exports present');"
